message:
fix(viz): WorkingFolderViz error boundary + semantic code tags

- Add WorkingFolderViz to viz-error-boundary.tsx (dynamic import, skeleton, withErrorBoundary)
- Remove duplicate data-viz attr from component (HOC wrapper already provides it)
- Replace literal backtick characters with <code> tags for semantic markup

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
